textByHash.7ff5c99ed22f5b8e347dfdfa2a999f01af600df1: Get away from Arrg, puny man-maggot. Or you lunch!
textByHash.51cc0d01c0e09fa9f655b3ec61201d2b9973a001: Yes, she good cook and wash but talk too many. Arrg strong troll, Arrg mighty troll, Arrg have many girlfriends!
textByHash.14f0049be7e5f6fd9ca83da52a198a9877c3ffc0: I no know, I just say to make Aga shut up!
textByHash.b206f27bca0cbf4a41e13b1f8ef3097c3fc10df8: Very good, Arrg was getting hungry.
textByHash.65ba812d5d974f4ad40b3ba58430e7be54275769: What you mean? Arrg strong troll, Arrg mighty troll. Every troll woman want Arrg.
textByHash.36764b6d16ecb821771efd67503ad6c5acda2346: This concept of 'love' confuses and infuriates Arrg.
textByHash.fbba788c988ab850c687dc0e98bf5f4e0df0b6af: Oh mighty man-warrior, please no hurt Arrg.
